query:
INSERT INTO authorised_agents (id,
                                      political_group_id,
                                      last_name,
                                      last_name_prefix,
                                      initials,
                                      created_at,
                                      updated_at)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
        RETURNING
            id,
            last_name,
            last_name_prefix,
            initials,
            created_at,
            updated_at
